title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Nestle India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Nestle India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Nestle India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nestle India International Enterprises:
Nestle India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India International Enterprises!
